cta.title: Ready to Meet Clyde?
cta.subtitle: Only 10 founding member spots available at EUR 997/mo. Meet Clyde and see what he can do for your agency.

q1.question: What is Clyde exactly?
q1.answer: Clyde is an AI marketing employee built specifically for agencies. He is not a tool you operate — he is a colleague you assign tasks to. Tell Clyde to write blog posts for Client A, call leads for Client B, and generate reports for Client C. He executes autonomously, 24/7.

q2.question: How does Clyde learn my clients' brands?
q2.answer: During onboarding, Clyde ingests each client's brand guidelines, tone of voice, target audience, and historical content. He continuously improves by analyzing performance data and your feedback. Every week, Clyde gets more aligned with each client's brand.

q3.question: Can Clyde work for multiple clients simultaneously?
q3.answer: Yes. Clyde handles 10, 20, or 50 clients at the same time without quality loss. Each client gets isolated brand context, so Clyde never mixes up tone, audience, or messaging between accounts.

q4.question: What happens if Clyde makes a mistake?
q4.answer: Every piece of content Clyde produces goes through your approval workflow before publishing. You set the guardrails — Clyde executes within them. If something needs adjustment, Clyde learns from the correction and avoids repeating it.

q5.question: How is Clyde different from ChatGPT or other AI tools?
q5.answer: ChatGPT is a general-purpose tool you prompt manually. Clyde is a specialized marketing employee that works autonomously. He knows your clients, follows your brand guidelines, publishes on schedule, and reports on results — without you writing a single prompt. Think colleague, not tool.

automations.quick_answer: AI Marketing Automations by Future Marketing AI replace manual marketing workflows with intelligent, self-running systems — so your team focuses on strategy while AI handles execution.

sections.challenges_heading: Why Does Your Marketing Team Need AI Automation?
sections.automations_heading: What Does Our Automation Service Include?
sections.process_heading: How Does an Automation Workflow Get Built?

q1.question: What is AI marketing automation?
q1.answer: AI marketing automation uses machine learning to execute repetitive marketing tasks — lead qualification, email sequences, CRM sync — without human intervention, running 24/7 with consistent quality.

q2.question: How long does it take to deploy an automation workflow?
q2.answer: Most workflow automations go live within 2-3 weeks: one week for audit and design, one week for build and testing, and a final integration sprint.

q3.question: Which tools do you integrate with?
q3.answer: We integrate with HubSpot, Salesforce, ActiveCampaign, Zapier, Make (Integromat), Airtable, Slack, Google Workspace, and most REST API-based platforms.

q4.question: Is AI automation suitable for small marketing teams?
q4.answer: Yes — AI automation scales down as well as up. Small teams (2-5 people) often see the biggest productivity gains because automation eliminates tasks that previously required dedicated headcount.

q5.question: What happens if an automation breaks?
q5.answer: All workflows include monitoring and error-handling. We provide 30-day post-launch support and can configure Slack/email alerts for any failure states.

q1.question: What makes an AI chatbot different from a rule-based chatbot?
q1.answer: AI chatbots use large language models to understand intent and generate contextual responses, while rule-based bots follow fixed decision trees. AI chatbots handle novel questions without pre-programmed paths.

q2.question: Can I try the chatbot before purchasing?
q2.answer: Yes — our Chatbots page features a live demo playground with 3 pre-configured personas: e-commerce, lead generation, and customer support.

q3.question: How do you configure the chatbot's persona?
q3.answer: Each chatbot receives a system prompt, tone guidelines, knowledge base documents, and example conversations. Configuration typically takes 3-5 business days for a production-ready persona.

q4.question: Does the chatbot integrate with my CRM?
q4.answer: Yes — chatbot-captured leads are routed directly to HubSpot, Salesforce, or your CRM via webhook. We configure the field mapping during onboarding.

q5.question: What languages does the chatbot support?
q5.answer: The underlying models support 50+ languages. We configure and test for your primary languages (EN/NL/ES as standard) during deployment.

q6.question: Is the chatbot GDPR compliant?
q6.answer: Yes — all conversation data is processed within EU data centers, chat history is not retained beyond the session by default, and we provide a DPA on request.

voice-agents.quick_answer: AI Voice Agents by Future Marketing AI handle inbound and outbound calls autonomously — qualifying prospects, scheduling appointments, and resolving support queries at scale.

sections.use_cases_heading: What Can AI Voice Agents Do?
sections.partnership_heading: How Do Voice Agents Integrate With Your Stack?

q1.question: What is an AI voice agent?
q1.answer: An AI voice agent is a conversational telephone bot that can handle inbound calls (qualifying prospects, answering FAQs) or make outbound calls (follow-ups, appointment reminders) using natural language.

q2.question: How human-like is the voice?
q2.answer: Modern text-to-speech models produce near-human speech with adjustable tone, pace, and accent. Most callers cannot distinguish the agent from a human in the first 30 seconds.

q3.question: What call scenarios can voice agents handle?
q3.answer: Lead qualification, appointment scheduling, inbound support routing, outbound reminders, NPS surveys, and post-purchase follow-up calls are the most common use cases.

q4.question: How do voice agents integrate with my phone system?
q4.answer: We use Twilio or Vonage as the telephony layer, which connects to most VoIP systems. SIP trunking or PSTN integration is included in all deployments.

q5.question: What is the average call deflection rate?
q5.answer: Clients typically see 40-70% deflection on repeat/FAQ inbound queries within the first 90 days, reducing live agent queue time significantly.

marketing-machine.quick_answer: The AI Marketing Machine by Future Marketing AI is an integrated system combining automations, chatbots, content production, and paid amplification into a single self-optimizing growth engine.

sections.features_heading: What Does the Marketing Machine Include?
sections.how_it_works_heading: How Does the Marketing Machine Get Built?

q1.question: What is the AI Marketing Machine?
q1.answer: The AI Marketing Machine is an integrated system combining workflow automations, conversational AI, content production, and paid amplification into a single self-optimizing growth engine managed for you.

q2.question: How is this different from buying individual tools?
q2.answer: Individual tools require manual orchestration. The Marketing Machine is a managed service where AI coordinates the tools, and we handle strategy, operations, and optimization.

q3.question: What does 'Marketing Machine' include?
q3.answer: A standard engagement includes: lead generation automations, a configured chatbot, content calendar and AI-assisted production, ad campaign management, and monthly optimization sprints.

q4.question: How long until I see results?
q4.answer: Infrastructure setup takes 3-4 weeks. Most clients see measurable pipeline impact (qualified leads, booked calls) within 60 days of launch.

q5.question: Is this suitable for B2C companies?
q5.answer: The Marketing Machine is optimized for B2B. B2C companies with high-ticket products (EUR 1.000+) can benefit, but the playbook is calibrated for longer sales cycles and account-based targeting.

q6.question: What does ongoing management involve?
q6.answer: Monthly: performance review, A/B test analysis, content refresh, ad budget reallocation, and chatbot knowledge base updates. Quarterly: strategy reassessment and roadmap update.

meta.title: About FMai | AI Marketing Employee for Agencies
meta.description: FMai builds persistent AI Marketing Employees for marketing agencies. One agent, pluggable skills, always learning. Built in the Netherlands for European agencies.

hero.title: About FMai
hero.tagline: Building the first AI Marketing Employee for agencies

mission.heading: Our Mission
mission.text: To give every marketing agency access to an AI employee that handles execution — so agency teams can focus on strategy, creativity, and client relationships. We believe agencies should scale by adding skills to their AI employee, not by hiring more juniors.
mission.why_text: We ran marketing operations ourselves and saw the same problem every agency faces: too many clients, too much repetitive work, not enough hours. So we built the AI employee we wished we had — one that learns each client's brand, works 24/7, and gets better every week.

assisted.title: AI-Assisted Era
assisted.description: Agencies adopted ChatGPT and AI tools for faster content drafts and research, but still needed humans to coordinate everything. Tools helped, but did not execute.

autonomous.title: AI Employee Era
autonomous.description: Persistent AI agents that execute full workflows autonomously. Your AI employee creates content, manages social, qualifies leads, and reports results — without supervision. This is where early-adopter agencies gain an insurmountable advantage.

standard.title: Standard Practice
standard.description: Every agency has AI employees. The agencies that started early have 2-3 years of compounding AI learning, making their agents significantly better than newcomers.

key_message.title: Early-adopter agencies gain a 2-3 year competitive advantage
key_message.description: Just like early adopters of programmatic advertising or marketing automation — the compounding effect of AI learning means starting now creates an advantage that late movers cannot close.

q1.question: Can I switch tiers later?
q1.answer: Yes — you can upgrade or downgrade your tier at any time. Changes take effect at the start of your next billing cycle. No penalties, no lock-in.

q2.question: Is there a setup fee?
q2.answer: No. Onboarding, configuration, and client workspace setup are included in every tier. You pay only the monthly subscription — nothing extra to get started.

q3.question: What is included in every tier?
q3.answer: Every tier includes a persistent AI employee running 24/7, a dashboard for monitoring activity, performance reporting, and support. Higher tiers add more skills, client workspaces, and dedicated strategy support.

q4.question: Can I add individual skills without upgrading?
q4.answer: Yes — any skill can be added to any tier at EUR 497/mo per skill. This lets you customize your AI employee for your agency's specific needs.

meta.title: Legal | Future Marketing AI
meta.description: Legal information, terms of service, privacy policy, and cookie policy for Future Marketing AI.

terms.title: Terms of Service
terms.content: These Terms of Service govern your use of the Future Marketing AI (FMai) platform and AI Marketing Employee services. By subscribing to or using our services, you agree to be bound by these terms. FMai operates as an Agent as a Service (AaaS) provider, delivering persistent AI agents with pluggable marketing skills to marketing agencies. Please read these terms carefully before using our platform.

service_description.title: 1. Service Description
service_description.content: FMai provides an Agent as a Service (AaaS) platform delivering AI Marketing Employee services with pluggable skills. Available skills include Content Creator (blog posts, social content, newsletters), Voice Agent (inbound/outbound calls, appointment booking), Lead Qualifier (chatbot, lead scoring, routing), Social Media Manager (multi-platform scheduling, engagement tracking), Ad Creator (AI-generated static and video ads), and Reporting & Analytics (cross-platform dashboards, weekly reports, anomaly detection). Skills are activated per subscription tier and can be added or removed at any time.

subscription_terms.title: 2. Subscription Terms
subscription_terms.content: Services are offered on a monthly subscription basis across four tiers: Founding Member (EUR 997/mo), Starter (EUR 1,497/mo), Growth (EUR 1,997/mo), and Agency (EUR 3,497/mo). Each tier includes a set number of skills and client workspaces. Additional skills can be added to any tier at EUR 497/mo per skill. Billing occurs monthly in advance. You may cancel your subscription with 30 days written notice, effective at the end of the current billing cycle. Founding Member pricing is locked for the lifetime of the subscription.

ai_output_disclaimer.title: 3. AI Output Disclaimer
ai_output_disclaimer.content: All content, recommendations, and outputs generated by your AI Marketing Employee are provided as drafts requiring human review before publication or distribution. FMai does not guarantee the accuracy, originality, factual correctness, or suitability of AI-generated output for any specific purpose. The subscribing agency is solely responsible for reviewing, editing, and approving all AI output before publishing to or on behalf of their clients. AI-generated content should not be relied upon as professional, legal, financial, or medical advice.

liability_limitation.title: 4. Limitation of Liability
liability_limitation.content: FMai's total aggregate liability arising out of or related to these terms shall not exceed the total fees paid by the subscriber in the twelve (12) months preceding the event giving rise to the claim. FMai shall not be liable for any indirect, incidental, special, consequential, or punitive damages, including but not limited to loss of profits, data, business opportunities, or goodwill. AI-generated output does not constitute professional advice of any kind, and FMai accepts no liability for decisions made based on such output.

data_processing.title: 5. Data Processing
data_processing.content: FMai processes data on behalf of the subscribing agency in accordance with GDPR Article 28. Detailed data processing terms are set forth in the Data Processing Agreement (Verwerkersovereenkomst), which forms an integral part of these terms. The agency, as data controller, is responsible for ensuring that appropriate legal bases exist for the processing of personal data through the FMai platform. A copy of the DPA is available upon request at privacy@futuremarketingai.com.

termination.title: 6. Termination
termination.content: Either party may terminate the subscription with 30 days written notice. Upon termination, your data export window is 30 calendar days, during which you can download all workspace data, content, reports, and configurations. After the 30-day export period, all agency data, client workspace data, and associated content will be permanently deleted from our systems and sub-processors. FMai may terminate your account immediately for material breach of these terms, including non-payment exceeding 30 days.

governing_law.title: 7. Governing Law and Disputes
governing_law.content: These terms are governed by and construed in accordance with the laws of the Netherlands. Any disputes arising from or in connection with these terms shall be submitted to the exclusive jurisdiction of the courts of Amsterdam, the Netherlands. Before initiating legal proceedings, both parties agree to attempt resolution through good-faith negotiation for a period of at least 30 days.

privacy.title: Privacy Policy
privacy.content: This Privacy Policy describes how Future Marketing AI (FMai) collects, uses, stores, and protects personal data in connection with our AI Marketing Employee platform. FMai is committed to protecting the privacy of our subscribers, their clients, and end users in compliance with the General Data Protection Regulation (GDPR) and applicable Dutch data protection laws. This policy applies to all data processed through our platform and website.

data_collected.title: 1. Data We Collect
data_collected.content: We collect the following categories of personal data: Account data (name, email address, company name, billing information), Client workspace data (brand voice documents, social media account connections, content schedules, target audience profiles), Usage data (platform activity logs, feature usage, execution counts), and AI interaction data (chat messages with AI agents, voice call transcripts, content generation prompts). We do not intentionally collect sensitive personal data (special categories under GDPR Article 9).

purpose_of_processing.title: 2. Purpose of Processing
purpose_of_processing.content: We process personal data for the following purposes: Providing AI Marketing Employee services (content creation, voice agent operations, lead qualification, social media management, ad creation, reporting), improving service quality and AI performance through aggregated usage analysis, billing and subscription management, providing technical support and customer service, and complying with legal obligations including tax, accounting, and regulatory requirements.

legal_basis.title: 3. Legal Basis
legal_basis.content: Our processing of personal data is based on the following legal grounds: Contract performance (GDPR Article 6(1)(b)) for providing our subscribed services, legitimate interest (GDPR Article 6(1)(f)) for service improvement, security monitoring, and fraud prevention, consent (GDPR Article 6(1)(a)) for analytics cookies and optional marketing communications, and legal obligation (GDPR Article 6(1)(c)) for tax and regulatory compliance.

ai_data_processing.title: 4. AI Data Processing
ai_data_processing.content: Our AI Marketing Employee processes data as follows: The Content Creator skill uses client brand voice documents and content briefs to generate marketing content — only the minimum context needed is sent to AI providers. The Voice Agent skill processes call audio for speech recognition and response generation — recordings are retained for 90 days for quality assurance. The Lead Qualifier skill analyzes form submissions and chat messages to score and route leads — lead scoring is advisory and does not make automated decisions. AI providers (OpenAI, Anthropic) process data under Zero Data Retention policies, meaning your data is not used to train AI models.

sub_processors.title: 5. Sub-processors
sub_processors.content: We use the following key sub-processors to deliver our services: OpenAI (content generation, US with EU Data Privacy Framework certification), Anthropic (content generation, US with EU Data Privacy Framework certification), Supabase (database and authentication, EU region - Frankfurt), Vercel (hosting and CDN, EU and global regions), and Vapi (voice agent processing, US). A complete and current list of sub-processors is maintained in our Data Processing Agreement (DPA). We notify subscribers at least 30 days before adding new sub-processors.

data_retention.title: 6. Data Retention
data_retention.content: Active accounts: All data is retained for the duration of the service agreement. Post-termination: A 30-day data export window is provided, after which all data is permanently deleted. Voice recordings and chat logs: Retained for 90 days after processing for quality assurance and dispute resolution. Platform logs: Retained for 90 days. Backups: Deleted within 30 days after source data deletion. Billing records: Retained as required by Dutch tax law (7 years).

data_subject_rights.title: 7. Your Rights
data_subject_rights.content: Under the GDPR, you have the right to: Access your personal data and receive a copy, rectify inaccurate or incomplete personal data, erase your personal data (right to be forgotten), restrict processing of your personal data, data portability (receive your data in a structured, machine-readable format), object to processing based on legitimate interest, and withdraw consent at any time for consent-based processing. To exercise any of these rights, contact us at privacy@futuremarketingai.com. We will respond within 30 days as required by the GDPR.

international_transfers.title: 8. International Data Transfers
international_transfers.content: Some of our sub-processors are located outside the EU/EEA, primarily in the United States. For these transfers, we rely on the following safeguards: The EU-US Data Privacy Framework (DPF) for certified US companies (OpenAI, Anthropic, Vercel, Stripe), and Standard Contractual Clauses (SCCs) approved by the European Commission where DPF certification is not available. Where possible, we use EU data center regions to minimize international transfers. We monitor legal developments regarding international transfers, including potential challenges to the DPF.

contact.title: 9. Contact and Supervisory Authority
contact.content: Data Controller: Future Marketing AI, the Netherlands. For privacy inquiries, data subject requests, or complaints: privacy@futuremarketingai.com. If you believe your data protection rights have been violated, you have the right to lodge a complaint with the Dutch Data Protection Authority (Autoriteit Persoonsgegevens / AP) at autoriteitpersoonsgegevens.nl.

cookies.title: Cookie Policy
cookies.content: Our website uses essential cookies required for basic functionality and optional analytics cookies to improve our services. Essential cookies cannot be disabled as they are necessary for the website to function. Analytics cookies are only set with your explicit consent. You can manage your cookie preferences at any time through your browser settings.

disclaimer.title: Disclaimer
disclaimer.content: The information on this website is provided for general informational purposes only. While we strive to keep the information accurate and up-to-date, we make no representations or warranties of any kind about the completeness, accuracy, or reliability of the information. Any reliance you place on such information is strictly at your own risk.

q1.question: What is included in the founding member plan?
q1.answer: You get a full AI Marketing Employee running 24/7, one skill of your choice (Content Creator, Voice Agent, Lead Qualifier, Social Media, Ad Creator, or Reporting), up to 3 client workspaces, direct founder access via Slack, and priority support. You can add more skills at EUR 497/mo each.

q2.question: What is the commitment length?
q2.answer: We ask for a 6-month initial commitment to give the AI employee enough time to learn your clients' brands and deliver measurable results. After 6 months, you continue month-to-month at the same locked-in price.

q3.question: What happens after the founding period ends?
q3.answer: There is no end date for founding members. Your EUR 997/mo price is locked for the lifetime of your subscription. As we raise prices for new customers, your rate stays the same — forever.

q4.question: How many spots are remaining?
q4.answer: We are limiting the founding member program to exactly 10 agencies. Once all spots are filled, new agencies start at the Starter tier (EUR 1,497/mo). Check this page for current availability.

q5.question: Is there a money-back guarantee?
q5.answer: Yes. If your AI Marketing Employee does not deliver measurable results within the first 60 days, we will refund your investment in full. No questions asked, no fine print.

cta.title: Ready to Be First?
cta.subtitle: Join the founding member program and lock in the lowest price forever.
